title: ConocoPhillips Deserves Its Higher Share Price

title: ConocoPhillips Greenlights $8 Billion Oil Project In Alaska Following Failed Block By Native Groups
text: Oil producer ConocoPhillips announced Friday it approved the construction funds for a $8 billion oil-drilling operation in Alaska known as Project Willow, a final investment decision that comes days after a federal appeals court rejected a bid from environmental and Alaska Native groups that sought to block the project's construction.

title: ConocoPhillips Makes Final Investment Decision to Develop the Willow Project
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--ConocoPhillips (NYSE: COP) announced today that it will move forward with development of the Willow project in Alaska. This Final Investment Decision approves the project and funds construction needed to reach first oil. The decision follows the Department of the Interior March 2023 Record of Decision and recent positive court orders, including this week's Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals denial of plaintiffs' request for an injunction. “We are excited to reach this sign.

title: ConocoPhillips: A Top Dividend Growth Bet For 2024 (Rating Upgrade)
text: ConocoPhillips recently increased its dividend rate by 14% due to strong free cash flow and earnings growth in a high-price market.
